title: Bonks' Extra Cobblemon Radiants
description: More Radiant textures for atm x msd radiants!
body:
Addon resource pack for Sky's atm x msd radiants!

Currently any radiant that doesnt have a texture appears as its base shiny texture, this addon changes this for the following mons:

Tentacool, Tentacruel, Doduo, Dodrio, Dratini, Dragonair, Dragonite, Shinx, Luxio, Luxray, Gible, Gabite, Garchomp, Axew, Fraxure, Haxorus, Fuecoco, Crocalor, Skeledirge, Whismur, Loudred, Exploud, Popplio, Brionne, Primarina, Phanpy, Donphan, Rotom (All forms), Litten, Torracat, Incineroar, Trubbish, Garbodor

With many more to come soon!!

Requires atm x msd, and atm x msd radiants to work! 

https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/radiants

Put these data/resourcepacks in both your resourcepack folder and your world/datapack folder. Or alternatively use a mod like globalpacks to do this for you :)






Credits to all the following:

- Sky for the orignal project, for helping me get set up and providing templates for the various resolver files!

  https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-radiants

- Nadi for giving me permission to use their models and textures from nadymons3 for my retextures!

  (Trubbish and Garbodor)

  https://modrinth.com/datapack/nadymons3

- RedRibbon for giving me permission to use their models and textures from missingmons for my retextures!

  https://modrinth.com/datapack/missingmons-cobblemon

- Zety for giving me permission to use their models and textures from lackingmons for my retextures!

  https://modrinth.com/datapack/lackingmons

- LegenTM for giving me permission to use their models and textures from HiddenMons for my retextures!

- Sanji for giving me permission to use their models and textures from Soul Megas for my retextures!

  https://modrinth.com/datapack/soul-megas-free-megas-for-all
